zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William John Henry of Griffith Webber III於1532年2月15日出生在英國賀福爾賀福德時，他的父親Griffith Nanton Weaver27歲，母親Edith Elizabeth Hatch24歲。他於大約1555年與Cecilia在英國英格蘭戴文巴恩斯塔普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1578年1月8日在威爾士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William John Henry of Griffith Webber III于1532年2月15日出生在英国賀福爾賀福德时，他的父亲Griffith Nanton Weaver27岁，母亲Edith Elizabeth Hatch24岁。他于大约1555年与Cecilia在英国英格兰戴文巴恩斯塔普爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1578年1月8日在威尔士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Webber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webber, an agent derivative of Webb .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Webb
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gruffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William John Henry of Griffith Webber III was born on 15 February 1532, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, his father, Griffith Nanton Weaver, was 27 and his mother, Edith Elizabeth Hatch, was 24. He married Cecilia about 1555, in Barnstaple, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 8 January 1578, in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William John Henry of Griffith Webber III est né le 15 février 1532, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Griffith Nanton Weaver, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Edith Elizabeth Hatch, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia environ 1555, à Barnstaple, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1578, à Presteigne, Radnorshire, Galles, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William John Henry of Griffith Webber III am 15. Februar 1532 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Griffith Nanton Weaver 27 und seine Mutter Edith Elizabeth Hatch 24. Er hat um 1555 in Barnstaple, Devon, England, United Kingdom Cecilia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 8. Januar 1578 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William John Henry of Griffith Webber III è nato il il 15 febbraio 1532 nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Griffith Nanton Weaver, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Edith Elizabeth Hatch, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia circa 1555, nel Barnstaple, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 8 gennaio 1578, nel Presteigne, Radnorshire, Galles, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William John Henry of Griffith Webber IIIが1532年2月15日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで生まれた時，父Griffith Nanton Weaverは27歳，母Edith Elizabeth Hatchは24歳であった。約1555年にイギリスイギリスデボンバーンスタプルでCeciliaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1578年1月8日にウェールズラドノーシュアイアプレステイグンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William John Henry of Griffith Webber III(이)가 1532년 2월 15일 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Griffith Nanton Weaver(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Edith Elizabeth Hatch(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1555년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 바른스타플에서 Cecilia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1578년 1월 8일 웨일스 라드노르실르 프레스테익니에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.15 February 1532–8 January 1578: 15 de fevereiro de 1532–8 de janeiro de 1578
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William John Henry of Griffith Webber III nasceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1532, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Griffith Nanton Weaver, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Edith Elizabeth Hatch, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia aproximadamente 1555, em Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1578, em Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William John Henry of Griffith Webber III родился 15 февраля 1532 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Griffith Nanton Weaver было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Edith Elizabeth Hatch, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia около 1555 г. в местности барнстапл, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 8 января 1578 г. в местности престиин, радноршир, Уэльс в возрасте 45 лет.

es.15 February 1532–8 January 1578: 15 de febrero de 1532–8 de enero de 1578
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William John Henry of Griffith Webber III nació el 15 de febrero de 1532, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Griffith Nanton Weaver, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Edith Elizabeth Hatch, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Cecilia aproximadamente 1555, en Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 8 de enero de 1578, en Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales, a la edad de 45 años.
